risks: APIM Consumption tier does not support VNet integration, private endpoints, or Microsoft Entra ID integration — limits network isolation and authentication options for backend services
No managed identity configured — plan relies on key-based auth for OpenAI and Cosmos DB, contrary to Azure security best practices
Single-region Cosmos DB with no failover or multi-region replication — risk of data unavailability during regional outages
API host resource type is ambiguous ('Azure Container App / Function App') — cannot generate valid IaC without a concrete ARM resource type
Missing supporting infrastructure resources (Log Analytics Workspace, Container Apps Environment or App Service Plan) required by the chosen compute host
No availability zone or redundancy configuration for any resource — reduced resilience for a real-time API workload
correctionsRecommended: Resolve API host to a concrete ARM resource type (Microsoft.App/containerApps or Microsoft.Web/sites) and add the required parent resources
Add a user-assigned managed identity and use RBAC-based access for Cosmos DB, Key Vault, and Azure OpenAI instead of key-based auth
Add Log Analytics Workspace (Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces) — required for Container Apps Environment diagnostics
Add Container Apps Environment (Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments) if using Container Apps, or a Storage Account if using Functions
Add explicit dependsOn entries: apiHost → openai, apiHost → cosmosAccount, apiHost → keyVault, apiManagement → apiHost
Consider upgrading APIM from Consumption to Standard v2 tier to enable VNet integration and Entra ID support
Enable Cosmos DB vector search (vector indexing policy) on the documents container for efficient embedding retrieval
Add a resource tagging strategy for cost allocation and operational governance
hardDependencies: API host resource type must be resolved to a specific ARM resource type before IaC generation
Container Apps Environment and Log Analytics Workspace must be added if Container Apps is the chosen host
Storage Account with StorageV2 kind must be added if Azure Functions is the chosen host
